leadText: Egg Bomb (Japanese: タマゴばくだん Egg Bomb) is a damage-dealing Normal-type move introduced in Generation I. It was TM37 in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations I to VII [ edit | edit source ] Egg Bomb inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. Egg Bomb does no damage to opponents with the Bulletproof ability. Egg Bomb can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination and a Contest Spectacular combination , with the user gaining 4 bonus appeal points if Soft-Boiled was used in the previous turn. Generation VIII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Egg Bomb cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Stad2 A Normal -type attack. An egg is launched at the target. It may miss, however. G S C Eggs are hurled at the foe. R S E An egg is forcibly hurled at the foe. FR LG A large egg is hurled with great force at the foe to inflict damage. Colo XD An egg is forcibly hurled at the target. D P Pt HG SS PBR A large egg is hurled with maximum force at the foe to inflict damage. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E A large egg is hurled at the target with maximum force to inflict damage. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.
